subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made manifest unto us His straight Path and illumined us with the light of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اوضح لنا صراطه المستقیم و نورنا بنور التوحید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @nationalism; love of country, @wisdom [hikmat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
